DGAI.scope_warning: this establishes aggregate structure only, never an unrecorded SHIM/NATIVE order

OdinANN.scope_warning: this establishes aggregate structure only, never an unrecorded SHIM/NATIVE order

not_permitted: SHIM/NATIVE sequence equality when those controls record no requests
wall-clock age, timestamp, timing, GC, relocation, or lifetime claim
permitted: submit-sequence distributions and exact fingerprints across repeated FULL traces

decision_scope: sequence-only structural audit; no wall-clock timing, GC, simulator state, or age claim

DGAI.interpretation: DGAI may use exact equality; OdinANN distances describe natural FULL-run variability and have no invented pass threshold.

OdinANN.interpretation: DGAI may use exact equality; OdinANN distances describe natural FULL-run variability and have no invented pass threshold.
